name: publicWeb_getGlobalRuns
description: Returns one row per event across all kennels for the hashruns.org global [Runs] discovery tab. Unlike publicWeb_getGlobalCalendar (which collapses multiple events per day per kennel into one row), this SP returns individual events with full kennel and event detail so the client detail panel needs no second API call. Supports offset-based pagination for infinite scroll.

parameters.name: IsFuture
parameters.description: 1 = upcoming events (EventStartDatetime >= now, ordered ASC). 0 = past events (EventStartDatetime < now, ordered DESC).

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Events per page. Defaults to 50. Clamped to 1–200 server-side.

parameters.name: Offset
parameters.description: Zero-based row offset for pagination. Defaults to 0.

rowsets.name: TotalCount
rowsets.description: Always exactly one row. Lets the client compute hasMore (offset + pageSize < totalMatchingEvents) without a separate count query.

columns.name: TotalMatchingEvents
columns.description: Total events matching the IsFuture filter before the PageSize cap is applied.

rowsets.name: GlobalRuns
rowsets.description: One row per event, ordered by EventStartDatetime ASC (future) or DESC (past), with KennelName and PublicEventId as deterministic tiebreakers. Empty rowset when no events exist.

columns.name: PublicEventId
columns.description: Public event GUID. Safe to use as a React list key.

columns.name: EventNumber
columns.description: Run number. Used to build the run permalink URL (/{slug}/{eventNumber}).

columns.name: EventName
columns.description: Display name for the event.

columns.name: EventStartDatetime
columns.description: Event start date and time with timezone offset.

columns.name: EventEndDatetime
columns.description: Event end time. NULL when not specified.

columns.name: EventTypeName
columns.description: Human-readable event type (e.g. 'Normal run', 'Red Dress Run'). NULL when ThemeRunType has no matching row.

columns.name: EventPriceForMembers
columns.description: Fee for members. COALESCEd with Kennel.DefaultEventPriceForMembers — non-NULL when either event or kennel has a fee set.

columns.name: EventPriceForNonMembers
columns.description: Fee for non-members. COALESCEd with Kennel.DefaultEventPriceForNonMembers.

columns.name: EventCurrencyType
columns.description: ISO currency code (e.g. 'GBP', 'USD'). COALESCEd with Kennel.DefaultEventCurrencyType.

columns.name: Hares
columns.description: Comma-separated hare names.

columns.name: LocationOneLineDesc
columns.description: Single-line venue description (e.g. 'The Queens Head').

columns.name: LocationStreet
columns.description: Street address. Computed from SyncLocationStreet (handles Facebook override).

columns.name: LocationCity
columns.description: City. Computed from SyncLocationCity.

columns.name: LocationPostCode
columns.description: Post/zip code. Computed from SyncLocationPostCode.

columns.name: LocationRegion
columns.description: State/county/region. Computed from SyncLocationRegion (Facebook override aware).

columns.name: LocationCountry
columns.description: Country name. Computed from SyncLocationCountry (Facebook override aware).

columns.name: Latitude
columns.description: Latitude for map link generation. Computed from SyncLatitude.

columns.name: Longitude
columns.description: Longitude for map link generation. Computed from SyncLongitude.

columns.name: w3wJson
columns.description: What3Words JSON blob containing 'map' (URL) and/or 'words' fields.

columns.name: EventDescription
columns.description: Event description text. Computed from SyncDescription (handles Facebook override).

columns.name: EventImage
columns.description: Event image URL. Caller must verify https:// prefix before rendering.

columns.name: EventUrl
columns.description: External event page URL.

columns.name: Tags1
columns.description: Bitflag column 1. Decoded client-side using the RunTag enum into human-readable tag strings.

columns.name: Tags2
columns.description: Bitflag column 2.

columns.name: Tags3
columns.description: Bitflag column 3 (reserved for future use).

columns.name: IsCountedRun
columns.description: 1 when the EventNumber counts toward the kennel's official run sequence, 0 for uncounted events.

columns.name: KennelSlug
columns.description: URL slug. Used to build run permalinks (/{slug}/{eventNumber}) and kennel page links (/{slug}).

columns.name: KennelName
columns.description: Full kennel name for display in the list card and detail panel.

columns.name: KennelLogo
columns.description: Kennel logo URL. Caller must verify https:// prefix before rendering.

columns.name: PrimaryColor
columns.description: CSS hex colour used for kennel name text and logo placeholder background in the list.

columns.name: PublicKennelId
columns.description: Public kennel GUID.

columns.name: KennelWebsiteDomain
columns.description: The kennel's custom domain (e.g. 'www.cityhash.org'). NULL for kennels without a custom domain. Used for the 'Open Kennel website' button and fourth QR code — omit both when NULL.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never remove Rowset 0 — callers rely on TotalMatchingEvents to compute hasMore
Never change the sort order within a tab — callers rely on stable pagination
